message:
dont sync labels with labeler

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@ name: CI/CD & PR Preview Pipeline
 
 on:
   push:
-    branches: [main, develop]
+    branches: [main]
   pull_request:
-    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, closed, labeled]
+    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, closed, labeled, unlabeled]
   pull_request_target:
-    types: [labeled]
+    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, labeled, unlabeled]
   workflow_dispatch:
 
 env:

@@ -19,3 +19,4 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/labeler@v4
         with:
           repo-token: "${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
+          sync-labels: false
